DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-10-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS KEVIN GRIFFIN, DISCOUNT PLUMBING AND HEATING, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES:
APPEAR: Andrew R. Wiener, Esq. 788-6330 for pltf & opposing party; Geofrey Rotwein, Esq. 781-2266 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Demurrer sustained as to all causes of action as to deft Discount Plumbing and Heating, Inc. ("DPH") with leave to amend. As to deft Griffin, demurrer overruled as to counts 1, 2, 3, and 4 in light of stipulation by parties. (302/AJR/AA) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
